name: Daisy!
text:
I enter ready.
Reduce my cost by :rb_energy_1: for each of the following tags among your units — Bird, Cat, Dog, and Poro.
When I attack while your units have all 4 tags, [Stun] an enemy unit here. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)
